examples: He asked her to the soda shoppe for an ice cream sundae.
Some people drive eighty miles just to visit the Apothecary Shoppe.
Don Colcord has owned Nucla's Apothecary Shoppe for more than thirty years.
Edwards went to the Soda Shoppe in Laconia to cast his one term in the Senate as an attribute.
The Pasta Shoppe, a Nashville mill, sells pasta shaped like crabs, the Star of David, and 65 college mascots.
